name: Grilled Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the green beans and place them on a large square of heavy duty foil.
2. Put the chopped onions and tomato slices over the beans.
3. Mix together the remaining ingredients until well blended.
4. Spoon the mixture over the beans and fold the foil tightly.
5. Cook for 30 to 35 minutes over medium hot coals.
